quotes.text: Every morning is a fresh page. Write something kind on it.
Small steps every day become a big adventure.
You showed up today. That already counts.
Be soft with yourself — mornings are for starting, not judging.
A warm heart beats a perfect plan.
Today's goal: one thing done with love.
Rest was yesterday's gift. Curiosity is today's.
The sun came back. So can you.
Streaks are built one gentle morning at a time.
Do it fluffy. Do it fuzzy. Just do it your way.
Even a slow morning is moving forward.
Protect your joy like it's part of the job.
You don't need a perfect day, just a started one.
Drink water, stretch, and be a little proud of yourself.
